title: Nested XML Structure
scenario: Generate a nested XML structure representing a book catalog with the following nodes: Root (Catalog), Books (3), and Chapters (9). Each book should have a unique ID and title. Each chapter should have a unique ID and title. The root node should have three books, each of which has three chapters.
constraints: Must contain exactly 12 levels of nesting
Each node must have a unique ID and name

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the XML syntax correct, well-formed, and adheres to the structure described in the scenario?
Do all nodes have unique IDs and are the chapter-book relationships correctly established in the XML structure?
Are the chapter-book relationships correctly established in the XML structure?
